_comment_top: R6 Wave 7 (Q9 batch migration) — seed row for the TextRefinementHandler 'summary' method.
_comment_routing: Runtime invocation routes to the C# class via sprk_handlerclass = 'TextRefinementHandler'. The handler reads sprk_configuration.method = 'summary' to dispatch to the summarisation pipeline.
_comment_method_dispatch: Three rows (TEXT-REFINE / TEXT-KEYPOINTS / TEXT-SUMMARY) share one handler class. Each row's sprk_configuration.method discriminator selects the internal method.
_comment_consumption: Read by scripts/Seed-TypedHandlers.ps1. Idempotent — script queries by sprk_handlerclass + sprk_name 'SYS-%' filter; UPSERTs.
sprk_description: Generate a concise summary of a text passage in the requested format (bullet | paragraph | tldr). Use when the user needs a quick overview of lengthy content — a paragraph summary, a TL;DR, or a structured bullet-point summary.
_comment_availableincontexts: 100000002 = Both (Playbook + Chat). Q9 batch migration: invocable from both playbook orchestration and chat-driven function calling.

sprk_jsonschema.title: TextRefinementHandler.GenerateSummary Request
sprk_jsonschema.description: Argument shape for chat-driven invocation of the summary method. The 'text' field carries the content to summarise; optional 'format' selects the output style.

text.description: The text passage to summarise. The handler does NOT pre-process this — it is the literal input to the LLM.

format.description: Desired output format: 'bullet' (default) — bullet list; 'paragraph' — single concise paragraph; 'tldr' — 1-2 sentence TL;DR.

sprk_configuration._comment: method = 'summary' is the dispatch discriminator. Default format = 'bullet'; per-invocation tool args may override.
